ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "sex" INTEGER /* Sex of the customer (1 = male, 0 = female) */,
  "education" INTEGER /* Education level of the customer (1 = graduate school, 2 = university, 3 = high school, 4 = others) */,
  "marriage" INTEGER /* Marital status of the customer (1 = married, 2 = single, 3 = others) */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the customer */,
  "income" REAL /* Income of the customer */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_history" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment record */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the payment */,
  "pay_1" INTEGER /* Payment status for the first month (-1 = paid, 1 = unpaid, 0 = not yet due) */,
  "pay_2" INTEGER /* Payment status for the second month */,
  "pay_3" INTEGER /* Payment status for the third month */,
  "pay_4" INTEGER /* Payment status for the fourth month */,
  "pay_5" INTEGER /* Payment status for the fifth month */,
  "pay_6" INTEGER /* Payment status for the sixth month */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date of each payment */,
  "late_fee" REAL /* Late fee associated with each payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payment_history_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bill_amounts" (
  "bill_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bill record */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who received the bill */,
  "bill_amt1" REAL /* Bill amount for the first month */,
  "bill_amt2" REAL /* Bill amount for the second month */,
  "bill_amt3" REAL /* Bill amount for the third month */,
  "bill_amt4" REAL /* Bill amount for the fourth month */,
  "bill_amt5" REAL /* Bill amount for the fifth month */,
  "bill_amt6" REAL /* Bill amount for the sixth month */,
  "bill_date" TEXT /* Date of each bill */,
  "payment_due_date" TEXT /* Due date of each bill */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bill_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bill_amounts_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_amounts" (
  "payment_amt_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment amount record */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the payment */,
  "pay_amt1" REAL /* Payment amount for the first month */,
  "pay_amt2" REAL /* Payment amount for the second month */,
  "pay_amt3" REAL /* Payment amount for the third month */,
  "pay_amt4" REAL /* Payment amount for the fourth month */,
  "pay_amt5" REAL /* Payment amount for the fifth month */,
  "pay_amt6" REAL /* Payment amount for the sixth month */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method used for each payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_amt_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payment_amounts_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "credit_limits" (
  "credit_limit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each credit limit record */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer with the credit limit */,
  "limit_bal" REAL /* Credit limit amount */,
  "credit_limit_date" TEXT /* Date the credit limit was established or updated */,
  "credit_limit_status" TEXT /* Status of the credit limit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("credit_limit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_credit_limits_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "risk_assessments" (
  "risk_assessment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each risk assessment record */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer with the risk assessment */,
  "risk_level" TEXT /* Credit risk level */,
  "risk_assessment_date" TEXT /* Date the risk assessment was performed */,
  "risk_assessment_score" REAL /* Score associated with the risk assessment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("risk_assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_risk_assessments_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., financial analyst, risk manager, customer service representative) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "user_access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user access record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user with access to customer data */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer whose data the user has access to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)
